list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Initial generation and data load tests passed. Updates: 1. Fix data schema mismatches: - ld_xxx references: changed from 'dict_string_value' to 'local_id' (table_template_03.csv) - [construction_site] renamed to [construction_sites] (table_template_04.csv) - NOT NULL constraints on [primary_site] references has been removed (table_template_04.csv) - NOT NULL constraints on [activated_at] for tables [project_parties] and [contract_parties] has been removed (table_template_05.csv)
2. DataTable class: - add option to generate table name with (default) or without namespace prefix
3. PersonalityEntity generator: - fix positioning for [gender] field.
4. ContractParties generator: - fix omitted field [is_customer]
5. ContractEntity generator: - fix optionality for [contract_date] field. Now it is not optional and always generated. Entity of Contract is invalid without this value.
6. Create and test hand_loader module: it is needs for data loading automation: by execute loading scripts one-by-one. Fix the right order of data loading.
7. DataTable class: - add option to expand business data definitions with data integration issues

task.summary:
Project initiated. Implements basic config: - DB section - C2S (csv2sql) section
Testing DB runners: - execute(f) - execute(f)_one - execute(f)_all
Testing c2s functionality

Transfer data faker logic from Jupiter notebook to Datagen_issues.py module.
Apply detailed comments to each component of Datagen_issues.py
Result not tested yet!
Create DataFaker.DataItem component. All ld_xxx local dictionaries generated and saved successfully. Establish DataFaker.E_Types enumeration to support data manipulation.

DataFaker - data generation tests passed. All non-real (fake) data components are generating.
Change logic of compound (pk/fk) generation. It now aligned with data requirements.
Data generation has 3 phases to complete all dependency generations.

Initial generation and data load tests passed. Updates: 1. Fix data schema mismatches: - ld_xxx references: changed from 'dict_string_value' to 'local_id' (table_template_03.csv) - [construction_site] renamed to [construction_sites] (table_template_04.csv) - NOT NULL constraints on [primary_site] references has been removed (table_template_04.csv) - NOT NULL constraints on [activated_at] for tables [project_parties] and [contract_parties] has been removed (table_template_05.csv)
2. DataTable class: - add option to generate table name with (default) or without namespace prefix
3. PersonalityEntity generator: - fix positioning for [gender] field.
4. ContractParties generator: - fix omitted field [is_customer]
5. ContractEntity generator: - fix optionality for [contract_date] field. Now it is not optional and always generated. Entity of Contract is invalid without this value.
6. Create and test hand_loader module: it is needs for data loading automation: by execute loading scripts one-by-one. Fix the right order of data loading.
7. DataTable class: - add option to expand business data definitions with data integration issues

MESSAGE.value:
Project initiated. Implements basic config: - DB section - C2S (csv2sql) section
Testing DB runners: - execute(f) - execute(f)_one - execute(f)_all
Testing c2s functionality

Transfer data faker logic from Jupiter notebook to Datagen_issues.py module.
Apply detailed comments to each component of Datagen_issues.py
Result not tested yet!
Create DataFaker.DataItem component. All ld_xxx local dictionaries generated and saved successfully. Establish DataFaker.E_Types enumeration to support data manipulation.

DataFaker - data generation tests passed. All non-real (fake) data components are generating.
Change logic of compound (pk/fk) generation. It now aligned with data requirements.
Data generation has 3 phases to complete all dependency generations.

Initial generation and data load tests passed. Updates: 1. Fix data schema mismatches: - ld_xxx references: changed from 'dict_string_value' to 'local_id' (table_template_03.csv) - [construction_site] renamed to [construction_sites] (table_template_04.csv) - NOT NULL constraints on [primary_site] references has been removed (table_template_04.csv) - NOT NULL constraints on [activated_at] for tables [project_parties] and [contract_parties] has been removed (table_template_05.csv)
2. DataTable class: - add option to generate table name with (default) or without namespace prefix
3. PersonalityEntity generator: - fix positioning for [gender] field.
4. ContractParties generator: - fix omitted field [is_customer]
5. ContractEntity generator: - fix optionality for [contract_date] field. Now it is not optional and always generated. Entity of Contract is invalid without this value.
6. Create and test hand_loader module: it is needs for data loading automation: by execute loading scripts one-by-one. Fix the right order of data loading.
7. DataTable class: - add option to expand business data definitions with data integration issues

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Initial generation and data load tests passed. Updates: 1. Fix data schema mismatches: - ld_xxx references: changed from 'dict_string_value' to 'local_id' (table_template_03.csv) - [construction_site] renamed to [construction_sites] (table_template_04.csv) - NOT NULL constraints on [primary_site] references has been removed (table_template_04.csv) - NOT NULL constraints on [activated_at] for tables [project_parties] and [contract_parties] has been removed (table_template_05.csv)
2. DataTable class: - add option to generate table name with (default) or without namespace prefix
3. PersonalityEntity generator: - fix positioning for [gender] field.
4. ContractParties generator: - fix omitted field [is_customer]
5. ContractEntity generator: - fix optionality for [contract_date] field. Now it is not optional and always generated. Entity of Contract is invalid without this value.
6. Create and test hand_loader module: it is needs for data loading automation: by execute loading scripts one-by-one. Fix the right order of data loading.
7. DataTable class: - add option to expand business data definitions with data integration issues
